description: Assistant session capturing applied fixes and commands run against backend and containers.

actions: Added script to create/update admin user: src/backend/scripts/create_admin.py
Fixed admin audit middleware to insert into table instead of ORM model: src/backend/src/app/audit.py
Added create_admin script execution and created admin user in DB
Fixed dramatiq worker CLI usage in docker-compose.yml
Addressed cryptography / DB auth issues by changing MySQL user auth and Dockerfile updates
Diagnosed and mitigated Illegal instruction (exit 132) by avoiding incompatible native wheels at runtime
Replaced pyjwt/passlib usages with lightweight implementations to avoid native dependency failures
Adjusted DB driver to aiomysql in config and pyproject (and docker-compose)

session_notes: Fixed multiple runtime issues causing 500 on admin login and worker startup failures. Created admin user and verified login endpoint. Implemented temporary container workarounds to avoid illegal instruction crashes.
transcript_summary: Created admin, fixed audit insert bug, fixed dramatiq CLI invocation, diagnosed cryptography/natives causing illegal instruction, applied workarounds and code changes to allow containers to start and admin login to succeed.
